subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast wholly devoted thy countenance unto God and turned thy face towards Him Who hath fashioned the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lieth between them, steadfast in faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اخلص وجهه لله و وجه الوجه للذی فطر السموات و الارض و ما بینهما و هو حنیف
